title: Final Year Engineering Project
convener: Mr E Ismail & Dr SL George
outline: The final -year engineering project requires students to investigate a topic related to engineering beyond that explicitly taught in the curriculum. They are required to undertake an analysis of that topic, drawing on literature and/or data as appropriate, to address the engineering problem/question(s) posed. The outcome of the project will be a deeper understanding of that topic.
dp_requirements: Please refer to the official course handout document for detailed information regarding the DP requirements for this course.
assessment: Please refer to the official course handout document regarding the assessment criteria for this course.
